name: Shanghai Zhonggu Logistics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Zhonggu Logistics Co., Ltd. provides container shipping services in China. It offers container transportation services; multimodal transport services, such as sea-land combined transportation, river-sea combined transportation, water-water transfer, sea-rail combined transportation, and cold chain transportation services; and ship management services. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Shanghai, China. Shanghai Zhonggu Logistics Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Zhonggu Shipping Group Co., Ltd.
